type: hero
---
hero_image: suppliers-intro/Intro-Hero-Placeholder.png
hero_subtitle: Welcome to the learning path:
hero_title: **Supplier Management with Inact Now**
hero_body: This is the intro to a four-part learning path. By the end, you will understand how to move beyond routine purchasing and adopt a more strategic approach. You’ll learn how to use Inact Now to manage your supplier portfolio, analyze purchasing data, and negotiate with greater confidence.

**Let’s get started!**

type: main
---
Most of the time, purchasing feels like a routine, reactive task.

When things get busy, it is easy to focus only on the immediate needs: placing orders to fill empty shelves and putting out daily fires just to keep the business running.

This is the trap of routine purchasing. It keeps the lights on, but it keeps procurement acting as a simple support function rather than looking at the bigger picture.

![image/size:eab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09525f04a-6c31-45bc-ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0950e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09530e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953d-00e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953c44a0136fbd1a11eab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09525f04a-6c31-45bc-ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0950e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09530e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953d-00e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953c44a0136fbf-2142-4ce0e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953-aeab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09525f04a-6c31-45bc-ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0950e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09530e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953d-00e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953c44a0136fb2f-d24cc4ed2d2d0e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095301ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095b0e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953de-ff0a2bd0-5d71-4616-b6ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0956-2620e0dd311b5ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4d20e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953-b35a-ff0a2bd0-5d71-4616-b6ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0956-2620e0dd311b5a4b50e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953eff1e0px/align:right/frame:none](suppliers-intro/Hamster-Wheel.png)
---
> [next] Continue -> 8b399b5c-fa9d-4ad8-ba37-9c086c08b62b

slide_id: 8b399b5c-fa9d-4ad8-ba37-9c086c08b62b
index_title: Three Costly Consequences
title: **Three Costly Consequences**
type: main
---
Failing to look at the bigger picture comes with costly consequences. When you manage suppliers without clear data, your business suffers in three critical ways:

{columns}
{column}
![image 0aff0a2bd0-5d71-4616-b6ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0956-2620e0dd311beab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09525f04a-6c31-45bc-ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0950e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09530e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953d-00e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953c44a0136fbd1a11eab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09525f04a-6c31-45bc-ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0950e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09530e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953d-00e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953c44a0136fbf-2142-4ce0e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-93 type: main
---
The good news is that these symptoms aren’t unfixable - organizations can evolve through different levels of maturity over time.

As an organization grows, procurement needs to grow with it. The focus shifts from chasing the lowest price to coordinating sourcing efforts, lowering total cost of ownership, and eventually optimizing the entire value chain.

We must actively move along this roadmap from being a reactive order-handler to a strategic partner. But how do we do that?

![image/size:eab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09525f04a-6c31-45bc-ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0950e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09530e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953d-00e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953c44a0136fbd1a11eab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09525f04a-6c31-45bc-ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0950e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09530e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953d-00e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953c44a0136fbf-2142-4ce0e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953-aeab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09525f04 0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953eff1e0px/align:right/frame:none](suppliers-intro/Roadmap.png)
---
> [next] Continue -> 1ccab2ac-5940-4d27-9ef3-b7c72c7cd8d1

slide_id: 1ccab2ac-5940-4d27-9ef3-b7c72c7cd8d1
index_title: The Balancing Act
title: **The Balancing Act**
type: main
---
**We need to shift our mindset to value chain thinking.** This shift transforms procurement from a simple support function into a key business driver of competitiveness, innovation, and sustainability.

Fulfilling this role means balancing three critical elements:

![image/size:large/align:center/frame:none](suppliers-intro/Triangle.png)
---
> [next] Continue -> 9bbab793-ae35-4237-8078-5cf7cd3626f8

[id:eab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09525f04a-6c31-45bc-ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0950e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09530e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953d-00e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953c44a0136fbd1a11eab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09525f04a-6c31-45bc-ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0950e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09530e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953d-00e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953c44a0136fbf-2142-4ce0e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953-aeab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09525f04a-6c31-45bc-ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0950e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09530e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953d-00e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953c44a0136fb2f-d24cc4ed2d2d/topic: The Reward]

slide_id: 9bbab793-ae35-4237-8078-5cf7cd3626f8
index_title: The Financial Reward
title: **The Financial Reward**
type: main
---
Why does this strategic shift matter? Because procurement is a powerful profit center.

The DuPont model clearly illustrates how strategic purchasing directly impacts a company’s overall return on capital employed (ROCE):

![image/size:large/align:center/frame:none](suppliers-intro/DuPont.png)
---
> [next] Continue -> 377f418c-e0dc-4eea-ab93-2a99e5415366

slide_id: 377f418c-e0dc-4eea-ab93-2a99e5415366
index_title: Turning Supply Chain Into a Competitive Advantage
title: **Turning Supply Chain Into a Competitive Advantage**
type: main
---
Beyond just the financial numbers, working strategically transforms your supply chain from a reactive support function into a true competitive advantage.

By mastering this approach, you will achieve five key objectives:

![image/size:large/align:center/frame:none](suppliers-intro/Five-Objectives.png)
---
> [next] Continue -> cf5b67f3-1d1c-4d82-bc13-b70dd92d8c5a

[id:0e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095301ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095b0e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953de-ff0a2bd0-5d71-4616-b6ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0956-2620e0dd311b5ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4d20e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953-b35a-ff0a2bd0-5d71-4616-b6ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0956-2620e0dd311b5a4b50e3ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b09536b3-4ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095a-4846-8d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b095-67d8ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953cc86ab0e3cc6-c91e-4e5c-9326-5ce06609b0953eff1e/topic: What's Next]

slide_id: cf5b67f3-1d1c-4d82-bc13-b70dd92d8c5a
index_title: What’s to Come
title: **What’s to Come**
type: main
---
To achieve these five objectives and drive that bottom-line impact, we need to implement a systematic, long-term approach.

In this learning path, we break this down into three core pillars using Inact Now:

{columns}
{column}

---
In the next course: **Supplier Performance**, you will learn how to use Inact Now to track delivery performance, inventory turnover ratio, and spend per supplier. Benchmark them against "best in class" and address poor performance.

**Let’s keep going!**
